modules_not_touched_and_why.engine/catalog/content.go: Phase-1 ContentStore.Read is single-version-only by design (1.4.2); this subtask's impacted-modules scope is engine/mvcc/read.go + read_test.go only, mirroring how 2a.1.1 added VersionWriter alongside ContentStore rather than modifying it.
modules_not_touched_and_why.engine/catalog/catalog.go: Already exposes Catalog.Get (reads CurrentVersion) and CompareAndSwapCurrentVersion (2a.1.2, verified); no new catalog API needed for a snapshot read.
modules_not_touched_and_why.engine/mvcc/write.go: Already exposes VersionWriter.VersionPath and CommitVersion (2a.1.1/2a.1.2, verified); read.go only calls existing exported methods, no changes needed.

risk: low — additive-only new file, no changes to already-verified 2a.1.1/2a.1.2 code paths; read-side has no locking requirement per the immutable-version-file reasoning documented in architecture-discovery.md.
regression_surface: engine/mvcc/write_test.go (TestVersionWriter, TestCurrentVersionCAS) must remain green — untouched by this change.
